note: key \u006dethod decodes to method (Node request); Rust has_key('method') fails on escaped key but id=T -> response
escaped method key, no id: Node notification; Rust sees no method/id/error -> unknown
id key escaped: Node decodes id (request); Rust has_key('id') fails, method=T -> notification
escaped id key, result present: Node has real id -> response; Rust no id/method/error -> unknown
error key escaped: Node decodes error -> error kind; Rust has_key('error') fails, id=T no method -> response
only escaped error key, no id: Node no id -> unknown; Rust no tokens -> unknown (AGREE)
all three keys escaped: Node method+id -> request; Rust matches none -> unknown
method VALUE has escaped char: both classify request; Node method=tools/list (decoded), Rust raw \u0074ools/list -> method divergence
escaped solidus: Node decodes tools/list, Rust keeps tools\/list -> request both, method differs
escaped solidus, notification both; Node method a/b/c vs Rust a\/b\/c -> method divergence
value is literal "method" with escaped quotes: raw has \"method\" so no bare "method" token; Rust id no method no error -> response; Node response (AGREE)
escaped quote in value then a real method key: Node has method+id -> request; Rust has_key method=T id=T -> request (AGREE)
lots of whitespace around colons/commas: Node parses request; Rust substrings still match -> request (AGREE)
literal tab bytes between tokens: Node parses request; Rust has_key matches -> request (AGREE)
escaped tab inside method value: Node decodes a<TAB>b, Rust keeps a\tb literal -> request both, method differs
\n inside value is escaped newline (one wire line): Node decodes real LF, Rust keeps line1\nline2 -> request both, method differs
value has literal backslash then n (\\n): Node decodes a\nb (backslash+n), Rust keeps a\\nb -> request both, method differs
value is \u006dethod decoding to 'method': Node response (no method key); Rust raw value not the token "method" so no method, id=T -> response (AGREE)
value decodes to 'id' but escaped so raw has no "id" token: Node no real id -> unknown; Rust no id token -> unknown (AGREE)
value mentions method but quotes are escaped so no bare "method" token: Rust response; Node response (AGREE)
escaped \"id\" gives no bare "id" token: Node unknown (no id); Rust unknown (AGREE)
key 'meth\u006fd' decodes to method (o escaped): Node request; Rust has_key('method') fails -> id only -> response
uppercase hex \u006D also decodes to method: Node request; Rust literal not matched -> response
spaced notification: Node notification; Rust method=T id=F -> notification (AGREE)
err\u006fr key decodes to error: Node id no method error -> error; Rust has_key('error') fails, id=T -> response
value contains \": looks like a key boundary but escaped: Node response (only result/id); Rust id no method no error -> response (AGREE)
tabs around colons, id:0 (Node counts id 0) -> request; Rust matches -> request (AGREE)
escaped method key + value decoding to 'id': Node method present no id -> notification; Rust no tokens (all escaped) -> unknown
key '\u0069d' decodes to id (only i escaped): Node real id -> response; Rust has_key('id') fails -> unknown
value mixes escaped tab and newline: Node decodes a<TAB>b<LF>c, Rust keeps a\tb\nc -> request both, method differs
